headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight text-[#2D2B2A] font-light

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 sm:px-8 lg:px-12 py-8 lg:py-12
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 or gap-8)
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat white or off-white backgrounds, 1px solid border-[#E5E0D8], rounded-2xl, subtle shadow-sm. No harsh gradients.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, mobile-first responsive, left-aligned standard content.

auth_gate.style: Centered card bento box layout. Generous padding, organic feel.

navigation_header.style: Sticky header, bg-[#EBE6DF]/90 backdrop-blur-md, solid bottom border. Contains 'Add Booking' CTA.

occupancy_widget.style: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4. Shows today's status at a glance. Clean, crisp neumorphism variant.

calendar_month_view.style: col-span-1 lg:col-span-2. Shadcn calendar customized with earthy selected dates and custom family dot markers.

timeline_gantt_view.style: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4. Horizontal scrolling. Rows for 'Homestead & Bunkie' and 'PinePoint'. Task bars use family color coding.

add_booking_modal.style: Shadcn Dialog. Uses Shadcn Form, Input, Select, and Calendar for check-in/out dates.

export_print.style: Provide a clean text-based list view or utilize CSS @media print to hide nav/buttons and expand timeline.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Kebab-case, role-based.

images.description: Sunny wooden cabin in forest, perfect for the family cottage login screen background.
images.usage: Use as a large side-panel or background for the shared-password login screen with a bg-black/30 overlay.
Small thumbnail/avatar next to the 'PinePoint' cabin title in the timeline/Gantt view.
Small thumbnail/avatar next to the 'Homestead & Bunkie' cabin title in the timeline/Gantt view.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI components: Button, Input, Form, Dialog, Select, Calendar, Popover.
2. Ensure all UI uses the Earthy Light Theme defined in 'colors'. Do not use default Vercel/Stripe styles. Use Tailwind CSS configurations to apply the custom base palette.
3. Login Screen: Create a simple shared password input logic. Style it using the 'auth_background' image behind a frosted glass or warm overlay card.
4. Dashboard Structure: Build a header with navigation, an 'Occupancy Today' summary card, a full-month Calendar View, and a Gantt-style Timeline.

5. Gantt Timeline: Construct a horizontal scroll layout with fixed rows for 'Homestead & Bunkie' and 'PinePoint'. Display bookings as styled absolute/relative bars mapped to date durations. Use family color-coding for these bars. Integrate the provided avatar images for each cabin row.
6. Add/Edit Booking Form: Open via modal (Shadcn Dialog). Capture Guest Name, Check-in, Check-out, and Cabin. Calculate availability logic.
7. Data Attributes: Crucially map 'data-testid' onto all actionable elements (auth gate, booking buttons, date selection, timeline items) per the testing_attributes section.

8. Export / Print Functionality: Add a CSS @media print block. Hide the main navigation, 'Add Booking' buttons, and modal overlays, forcing the calendar and timeline into a clean, auto-expanding width.
9. Fonts: Import Cabinet Grotesk (for headers) and Work Sans (for body UI). Avoid standard 'Inter' for UI blocks where possible.
